faqs.question: 最小起订量是多少？
faqs.question_en: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqs.answer: 不同产品的起订量不同，一般在50-100件之间。具体请咨询我们的销售团队。
faqs.answer_en: MOQ varies by product, typically between 50-100 pieces. Please contact our sales team for details.

faqs.question: 产品有哪些认证？
faqs.question_en: What certifications do your products have?
faqs.answer: 我们的产品测试符合ASTM、EN等国际标准，可根据目标市场要求提供相应测试报告和合规文档。
faqs.answer_en: Our products are tested to ASTM, EN and other international standards. We can provide test reports and compliance documents based on your target market requirements.

faqs.question: 交货期是多久？
faqs.answer: 样品交期7-10天，大货交期25-45天，具体取决于订单数量和产品类型。
faqs.answer_en: Sample lead time is 7-10 days, production lead time is 25-45 days, depending on order quantity and product type.

faqs.question: 可以定制产品吗？
faqs.answer: 是的，我们提供OEM/ODM服务，可以根据您的需求定制产品颜色、包装、Logo等。
faqs.answer_en: Yes, we offer OEM/ODM services. We can customize product colors, packaging, logos, etc. according to your requirements.

faqs.question: 如何获取报价？
faqs.question_en: How can I get a quote?
faqs.answer: 请通过网站联系表单或直接发送邮件至我们的销售团队，我们会在24小时内回复。
faqs.answer_en: Please use our contact form or email our sales team directly. We will respond within 24 hours.

faqs.question: 付款方式有哪些？
faqs.question_en: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: 我们接受T/T（电汇）、L/C（信用证）等方式。标准条款为30%预付，70%见提单副本付款。小额订单可接受PayPal。
faqs.answer_en: We accept T/T (wire transfer), L/C (letter of credit). Standard terms: 30% deposit, 70% against B/L copy. Small orders can use PayPal.

faqs.question: 装运港口在哪里？
faqs.question_en: Which port do you ship from?
faqs.answer: 主要从上海港和宁波港发货，也可根据客户要求从其他港口发货。
faqs.answer_en: We mainly ship from Shanghai and Ningbo ports. Other ports available upon request.

faqs.question: 可以提供样品吗？
faqs.answer: 可以提供样品。标准样品7-10天内发出，定制样品需10-15天。样品费用可在后续大货订单中抵扣。
faqs.answer_en: Yes, we provide samples. Standard samples in 7-10 days, customized samples in 10-15 days. Sample cost can be deducted from bulk order.

faqs.question: 产品质量如何保证？
faqs.question_en: How do you ensure product quality?
faqs.answer: 我们实行三级质检体系：来料检验(IQC)、过程检验(PQC)、出货检验(FQC)。所有产品100%通过安全测试，可安排第三方检测。
faqs.answer_en: We implement 3-level QC: IQC (incoming), PQC (process), FQC (final). All products pass 100% safety testing. Third-party inspection available.

faqs.question: 产品出口哪些国家？
faqs.question_en: Which countries do you export to?
faqs.answer: 产品主要出口美国、欧盟、英国、澳大利亚、加拿大等30多个国家和地区，熟悉各国合规要求。
faqs.answer_en: We export to 30+ countries including USA, EU, UK, Australia, Canada. We are familiar with each country's compliance requirements.

faqs.question: OEM定制需要多少起订量？
faqs.question_en: What is MOQ for OEM customization?
faqs.answer: OEM定制起订量根据产品类型不同：颜色定制100件起，Logo印刷200件起，包装定制300件起，全新设计500件起。
faqs.answer_en: OEM MOQ varies: custom color 100 units, logo printing 200 units, packaging 300 units, new design 500 units.

faqs.question: 如何获取测试报告？
faqs.question_en: How can I get test reports?
faqs.answer: 请发送邮件至sales@b2bbaby.com，注明所需报告类型和产品型号。我们提供ASTM、EN、CPC等完整测试报告。
faqs.answer_en: Email sales@b2bbaby.com with report type and product model. We provide complete ASTM, EN, CPC test reports.

faqs.question: 售后政策是什么？
faqs.answer: 所有产品提供12个月质保。质量问题免费更换配件或退货。技术支持24小时在线响应。
faqs.answer_en: All products have 12-month warranty. Free replacement or return for quality issues. 24/7 technical support available.

faqs.question: 可以参观工厂吗？
faqs.answer: 欢迎参观工厂！请提前预约，我们可安排接送和参观行程。工厂位于安徽合肥，距离上海约2小时高铁。
faqs.answer_en: Factory visits welcome! Please schedule in advance. We can arrange pickup and tour. Factory in Hefei, Anhui, 2 hours by train from Shanghai.

faqs.question: 产品包装方式有哪些？
faqs.answer: 提供多种包装方式：彩盒、邮购盒、托盘包装。可根据客户要求定制包装设计和尺寸。
faqs.answer_en: Multiple packaging options: color box, mail order box, pallet packing. Custom packaging design and size available.
